violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of 2-door prep cooler needs cleaned of food debris.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.

General equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of equipment * did not meet a design characteristic specified in the food service code. Remove protective film from upright cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside 2-door prep cooler needs cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor under stove and prep cooler need cleaned of food debris.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
